metadata.phase_vertex_convention: Gamma_theta(k) = dH_BdG/dtheta at pair center-of-mass phase; for k-dependent Delta this implementation uses phase_vertex=symmetric_kpm, while quasiparticles are routed through k±q/2.
Gamma_theta(k) = dH_BdG/dtheta at pair center-of-mass phase; for k-dependent Delta this implementation uses phase_vertex=symmetric_kpm, while quasiparticles are routed through k±q/2.
